caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed on the front, and a gold watch sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark desk equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black mug. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring gold stars and the repeated text "UNICORN HUSTLE," as well as a blue banner that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". In the bottom corners of the scene, a logo featuring a microphone and the text "THE BOSS TALK OUT LOUD" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man is engaged in conversation, shifting his gaze and gesturing with his right hand. He begins by looking slightly to his left, then turns further toward the right, and eventually gestures with an open hand while speaking before returning his hand to the desk.
